retrieval_runtime.summary: Image evidence is currently indexed through proxy text, and reranking remains text-only rather than native multimodal.

report.answer: Positive feedback appears on value_price. Value_price is partially supported by product-page text. The most important negative issue is Portability_Size. There is still some disagreement around overall_experience, which should be interpreted by user segment and usage context.

strengths.label: value_price
strengths.summary: Positive feedback dominates for value_price, appearing 1 times.

weaknesses.label: Portability_Size
weaknesses.summary: User feedback reports a negative issue around portability_size: The quality is excellent. +5 Workmanship is excellent. +5 Delivery process is excellent +5 I did not get the product I wanted. -3 I did not see size (dimensions) mentioned on the site. -3 I am however a satisfied customer +4 I have not used it because it is smaller than the size (one above) that I have..
